flavourText: Born from the building blocks of the universe. Only by mastering atoms and bonds can you topple this elemental giant.
Fuelled by hydrocarbons and enthalpy. Break its bonds and extinguish its flames with Hess's law.
Rises from the brine, armed with oxidation and displacement. Balance the redox to drag it down.
A chain reaction of destruction in the stratosphere. Terminate its radicals before the ozone falls.
Hides functional groups behind spectral disguises. Use IR and mass spec to reveal the cure.
Commands reaction kinetics and equilibrium at industrial scale. Master Kc and rate equations to outpace it.
Weaves amino acids into chains of protein armour. Hydrolyse its bonds to unravel its defences.
Lurks in the deep, shielded by buffer solutions and Born-Haber cycles. Only thermodynamic mastery prevails.
Forged from d-block metals and complex ions. Measure its electrode potential to find its weakness.
Shifts colour through conjugation and delocalisation. Only Friedel-Crafts and organic synthesis can pin it down.
